name: Love Area
original_name: ครั้งหนึ่งเราเคยรักกัน
overview: Valen is a young man born on Valentine's Day but has never known love, not even the love of his parents. At the lowest pointof his life, he suddenly meets someone who shows him compassion and tenderness.
